brief: US-Iran tensions escalate with airstrikes over tanker attacks, while Australia deals with Telstra outage affecting triple-zero calls and Graham Platner suspends his Senate campaign amid sexual assault allegations. In academia, new HCI research explores visualization incentives, brain-computer interfaces in China, and sign language recognition.
news_summary: US launches airstrikes on Iran for a second day after Trump says ceasefire agreement is 'over', following tanker attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. In Australia, Telstra's outage disrupts triple-zero calls, and Democrat Graham Platner suspends his Senate campaign after sexual assault accusation.
papers_summary: Research on performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China lead the arXiv papers, along with studies on sign language recognition using smart gloves and AI-powered programming environments.

en.brief: US-Iran tensions escalate with airstrikes over tanker attacks, while Australia deals with Telstra outage affecting triple-zero calls and Graham Platner suspends his Senate campaign amid sexual assault allegations. In academia, new HCI research explores visualization incentives, brain-computer interfaces in China, and sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: US launches airstrikes on Iran for a second day after Trump says ceasefire agreement is 'over', following tanker attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. In Australia, Telstra's outage disrupts triple-zero calls, and Democrat Graham Platner suspends his Senate campaign after sexual assault accusation.
en.papers_summary: Research on performance-based incentives in visualization experiments and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China lead the arXiv papers, along with studies on sign language recognition using smart gloves and AI-powered programming environments.

zh.brief: 美伊冲突升级，特朗普称停火协议结束；台湾管制事後避孕藥引發爭議；德国性侵案受害者发声。研究方面探讨中国脑机接口临床转化与传统绘画分析。
zh.news_summary: 美伊彻夜交火，特朗普称停火协议作废并发动新空袭；台湾拟加强事后避孕药管制，引发女性不便与风险担忧；德国华人性侵案首位受害者公开经历。
zh.papers_summary: 英文论文探讨中国脑机接口临床试验的现状与监管，以及基于构图图的传统中国画分析系统。

todays_image.caption: Like the way Lobophora sp. algae forms intricate networks on reefs, Telstra is weaving a more reliable emergency call system, while Hanson's podcast with Tommy Robinson tangles the lines of public discourse.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
